narrative:
Sugarcreek 152 (precinct in Greene County) has 1,073 registered voters, with 46.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.3 percentage points.
